name: Syntax
short_description: This game is an intense and exciting shooting game where players wield a black gun, battling across an expansive wilderness under a clear blue sky.
detailed_description: This game is an intense and exciting shooting game, where players wield black firearms and traverse vast wilderness under clear blue skies. The visual effects of the game are simple yet exquisite, creating a beautiful natural landscape against the backdrop of blue sky and white clouds. Players use the ASDW key to control the character's movement in the scene, and use the left mouse button to aim and shoot floating black cube enemies. Although the forms of these enemies are simple, their random appearance and orientation increase the challenge of the game. The game has a tight and exciting pace, and each successful shooting enhances the realism of the battle. Who can survive on this vast land and become the ultimate winner? This game not only tests players' reaction ability, but also their strategic planning ability.
